app.title: PowMon · Inverter
app.compareTip: Overlay a second day on the charts
app.advancedTip: Extra panels for debugging: grid voltage history (did the power fail?), real vs apparent power
app.footer: {{n}} samples · {{w}} window · data via MQTT → fastify (SSE)

settings.tariffHint: Used to turn energy into money on the dashboard. Saved on the server — applies to every device viewing this dashboard.
settings.invalid: Check the values — they must be valid numbers.
settings.error: Could not save. Is the server reachable?
settings.billingHint: How your utility bills you. Default: every month starting on the 1st. CFE bimonthly example: every 2 months starting on the 13th, anchored to a month a period began (e.g. January).
settings.anchorMonth: A month a period starts in
settings.locationHint: Used to shade nights (sunset to sunrise) on the charts, so you can see at a glance when solar should rise and fall. Find your coordinates in any maps app. Leave empty to disable.

lock.title: Locked
lock.hint: Saving settings is password-protected on this server. Enter the password to make changes.

readonly.title: Read-only
readonly.note: This dashboard is published read-only. Settings are shown but can't be changed here — saving is disabled on this server.

chartTip.battery_to_mains_v: Below {{v}} V the inverter stops draining the battery and switches the output to grid bypass.
chartTip.mains_to_battery_v: Above {{v}} V the output switches from grid bypass back to the battery (inverter).
chartTip.float_v: Float stage: once the battery is full, the charger holds it at {{v}} V.
chartTip.boost_v: Absorption stage: after the bulk charge, the charger holds the battery at {{v}} V (max {{boostMins}} min), then drops to float.
chartTip.equalize_v: Equalization: every {{eqDays}} days the charger raises the battery to {{v}} V for {{eqMins}} min to balance the cells — voltage climbs even though the load hasn't changed.

tip.battery_soc: How full the battery is, like a fuel gauge. 100% = full, 0% = empty.
tip.battery_voltage: The battery's voltage. Higher means more charged; it dips under heavy load.
tip.battery_power: Power flowing in or out of the battery. Positive = charging, negative = draining.
tip.pv_total_power: Power your solar panels are producing right now. 0 at night, or when the battery is full and isn't asking for more.
tip.load_power: Power your appliances are drawing right now — the inverter's output to your devices.
tip.grid_voltage: Voltage coming in from the utility grid. Near 0 means the grid is down or disconnected.
tip.output_voltage: Voltage the inverter delivers to your appliances. Should sit near 120 V.
tip.temp_transformer: Temperature of the inverter's transformer. It climbs under heavy load — a health and safety check.
tip.today_pv_kwh: Total solar energy harvested so far today. Resets at midnight.
tip.today_load_kwh: Total energy your appliances have consumed so far today. Resets at midnight.
tip.temp_ambient: Air temperature at the inverter's internal sensor — how hot the unit's surroundings are.
tip.today_grid_kwh: Energy bought from the utility grid so far today — including any used to charge the battery, not just your appliances. Resets at midnight.
tip.load_percent: How much of the inverter's capacity is in use. High numbers mean you're close to its limit and it may shut off to protect itself.
tip.spent_today: What today's grid energy has cost so far, at your tariff (tax included). Includes power used to charge the battery. Set the rate in ⚙ Settings.
tip.saved_today: The value of today's solar harvest at your tariff — what these kWh would cost if bought from the grid. Part goes to your appliances, part to the battery, part to conversion losses.
tip.saved_total: Everything your panels have harvested since installation, valued at today's tariff.
tip.period_pv_kwh: Solar energy harvested in the current billing period.
tip.period_grid_kwh: Grid energy bought in the current billing period — battery charging included. This is what your next bill is counting.
tip.period_spent: This billing period's grid energy at your tariff (tax included) — a preview of your next bill.
tip.period_saved: The value of this period's solar harvest at your tariff — what these kWh would cost from the grid.
